rows.label: tev001792_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good evening, [ST:playername ]. What a
surprise to see you here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0002
rows.name: I'm actually waiting to meet someone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001792_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Himeri who she's waiting to meet.

rows.label: tev001792_JNK0020
rows.name: Apologize

rows.label: tev001792_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you're sorry for arriving late.

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0003
rows.name: Are you that curious?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, it's just Ada. We're
going shopping together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0005
rows.name:
She insisted that I refuse to
counsel anyone on my day off, and
instead focus the time on myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oh no! We had an
appointment to meet today?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh dear. I didn't see
that on my schedule.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0008
rows.name:
It must have completely slipped
my mind. I am so terribly sorry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0009
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0010
rows.name:
You're lying, aren't
you? Don't be a jerk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Anyway, I'm here to have
a little fun with Ada.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0012
rows.name:
She's going to take me shopping for clothes, and
then maybe to pick up some fertilizer for my flowers.
After that, she's promised to buy me dinner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_JNK0110
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: tev001792_SEL0111
rows.name: Tell Himeri to have a wonderful time.

rows.label: tev001792_JNK0120
rows.name: Discourage

rows.label: tev001792_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask Himeri if she really thinks she'll be able to pull off all that shopping in one day.

rows.label: tev001792_JNK0130
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001792_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask Himeri what she's having for dinner.

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thank you. I hope everything goes
well and we have a lovely evening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ada has promised that we'll be dining on the
finest steak in NLA, so it would be rude of
me not to try and thoroughly enjoy it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0015
rows.name:
I will strive to be as
uninhibited as I possibly can![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm not exactly confident it will go
as planned either, but I don't know
why you need to put it so harshly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0017
rows.name:
Honestly, I fear I'll end up
meeting someone in need and
feel obligated to help them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0018
rows.name:
I don't mind doing that sort of thing, but it
annoys poor Ada to no end. It would certainly
make for an awkward evening if it were to happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0019
rows.name: Apparently, we'll be having steak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ada says she received an unexpected
reward for a mission she completed,
and is in the mood to splurge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0021
rows.name:
I feel terrible that she's wasting
it on me, but I'll suck it up and
enjoy it as best I'm able.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0022
rows.name:
After all, no one knows better
than I that true joy comes from
bringing happiness to others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0023
rows.name: And I mustn't deny her that, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001792_MSG0024
rows.name:
Ah, that's Ada over there. I
should be going. I look forward
to working with you again soon![ST:wait ]
